issues.comment: The `ensure_loaded!` method does not convert its `locale` argument to a symbol before checking `@loaded_locales.include?(locale)`. Since `@loaded_locales` stores symbols exclusively (via `load_locale` which calls `locale.to_sym`), passing a string locale (e.g. `"en"`) will cause the `.include?` check to always return `false` (since `"en" != :en` in Ruby), resulting in redundant `load_locale` calls on every request. The fix is to add `locale = locale.to_sym` as the first line of `ensure_loaded!`.
